reviews.review_text: Nery was amazing!! The food and drinks was so delicious, would come back!
Nery was a great server! Great food and location
Our server Nery was very generous. We definitely will be coming back!
Nery was a great server! Great food and location
Our server Nery was very generous. We definitely will be coming back!
Atmosphere was very lively. Our server Nery was attentive and outright amazing. Will be coming back again!!

The new outside seating setup is very nice.
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Add March 13 - love their seafood dishes. Today I had pescado amigo - very very good.
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

I went here today for the first time in many years. Had arroz con mariscos, excellent along with the margarita. Ate outside, it was pleasant.
Food was incredible and very reasonable prices. Nery did an excellent job with service! We will be back
Taco tuesdays are the best here! I really also love their guac and margaritas. My boyfriend and I come here at least twice a month and the service has always been excellent.
Nery was amazing!! The food and drinks was so delicious, would come back!
Atmosphere was very lively. Our server Nery was attentive and outright amazing. Will be coming back again!!
Great service with Nery as server! Definitely will be back. Food was AMAZING!!!

The new outside seating setup is very nice.
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Add March 13 - love their seafood dishes. Today I had pescado amigo - very very good.
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

I went here today for the first time in many years. Had arroz con mariscos, excellent along with the margarita. Ate outside, it was pleasant.
Everyone at this restaurant is always so friendly, wonderful food. We love this place. One of our favorite restaurants.

Went last Tuesday and had Autumn as a server. She was OUTSTANDING.

We had waited 25 minutes instead of 15 so we could sit outside and then when they called us to be seated they took us to a booth inside. We mentioned wanting to sit outside and they were so weird about it. We asked how much longer we would have to wait to sit outside and the hostess said, “I don’t know. So do you want this table?”

It was really off putting. But then Autumn came to the table and turned the whole thing around! Her whole energy was great! She was attentive, but not annoying. She was knowledgeable about the menu when we asked questions. She made sure we had everything we needed. She chatted with us a perfect amount where we felt the love but not like we had an extra guest for dinner. lol. She definitely earned her tip and then some!!

I will be back and asking to be sat in Autumn’s section!

Also, the food was amazing as always! I finally tried the chipotle chimichanga and I’m in love! Please keep it around!!!
Atmosphere was very lively. Our server Nery was attentive and outright amazing. Will be coming back again!!
Nery was great!  Appreciate the attentive service!

My wife and I had a great experience here the food was high quality well made and well worth the price our server nery did a fantastic job was very attentive to our requests the drinks were fresh the food was light definitely will be coming back.
Nery is very very good. He’s da best! Numero Uno!!!!

Our best go-to place. The food and drinks Never disappoints.
The new outdoor place is amazing.
The staff and service are great.
Nery is the best!
Excellent meal and amazing service by Daniel! We love this place and the renovations look awesome!
Nery was awesome! Happy Cinco de Mayo!
Nery took care of us and the food and service were awesome.

I had a pregnancy craving for birria tacos, so we decided to order some takeout tonight (5/30). By the time we got home after picking up the food, I realized that the consommé wasn’t in the to go order. I guess I should’ve double checked the contents of the bag before leaving, but I didn’t want to tear into it yet.

I was really disappointed because the whole point was to have the rich hearty broth to dip the tacos in. (side note- I also asked for utensils but none were provided :/). That oversight bummed me out as I was hungry and didn’t want to go all the way back just to pick up that one thing.

Definitely not what I expected for authentic Mexican Cuisine. My order was blah. Admittedly, my guest ate all of their food. We ordered two rounds of margaritas, and I probably could have had 15 rounds and still not feel tipsy. We both agreed that there appeared to be no tequila in the drinks. The server was okay, but not very welcoming. The spacing was such that they packed a lot of tables into that space so, even going to the restroom you had to twist and maneuver around seated guests.

We had a party of 20 Saturday may 9th for my cousin bday unfortunately the beef was terrible everyone of us who ordered beef tacos or something with beef in it experienced nausea and sickness my Neice worst of them all she had two beef Barria tacos well today she is in the hospital with a stomach virus fever of 104 degrees and now a team is looking into her having GI issues something with her pancreas after eating that beef, I also read another review where a lady said after eating here she started experiencing GI problems I pray this doesn’t affect my Neice that bad she is 18 she has senior finals today and prom on the 21st what a terrible time for this to happen. The beef did taste funny me myself was nauseated that night had a headaches chills and threw up same with my Neice I only ate half taco because it tasted funny I knew something was wrong with from the first two bites…… we will be looking into a lawyer because everyone said the same thing some of us sitting ten seats down from each other and the other side of the table was sending the beef back as well and complaining. DONT EAT THE BEEF HERE!!!!!!!

We had a party of 20 Saturday may 9th for my cousin bday unfortunately the beef was terrible everyone of us who ordered beef tacos or something with beef in it experienced nausea and sickness my Neice worst of them all she had two beef Barria tacos well today she is in the hospital with a stomach virus fever of 104 degrees and now a team is looking into her having GI issues something with her pancreas after eating that beef, I also read another review where a lady said after eating here she started experiencing GI problems I pray this doesn’t affect my Neice that bad she is 18 she has senior finals today and prom on the 21st what a terrible time for this to happen. The beef did taste funny me myself was nauseated that night had a headaches chills and threw up same with my Neice I only ate half taco because it tasted funny I knew something was wrong with from the first two bites…… we will be looking into a lawyer because everyone said the same thing some of us sitting ten seats down from each other and the other side of the table was sending the beef back as well and complaining. DONT EAT THE BEEF HERE!!!!!!!

If i could rate this place zero I would. Rarely do I ever take my time to write a bad review, I understand when places are busy and need that grace. Used to come here often a couple years ago and it would be decent. Today (mother’s day) I went in and placed an order for carry out for 2 tacos and a queso, to bring to my grandma. They said the estimated wait was 15 minutes, I came back 15 minutes later and was told 5 minutes. 5 minutes later, the host says another 10 minutes. At this point I was just disappointed in being told inaccurate times multiple times. After 35 minutes, I am going to be late to my grandma’s and the food is still not ready. I ask for a refund, and someone comes out to give me a refund. I express that I really wish I would have known it was a 30+ minute wait, or I would not have ordered due to time restraints. Right after this, alberto, goes “20 minutes”, as if I was lying about timing. THIS was exactly why I decided to write this review. (My receipt says 5:15pm and we left the restaurant at 5:51). Anyways…. the hosts were doing the best they could with communicating so I appreciated their help.

I ordered a ground beef chimichanga and they gave me shredded beef and I was already home when I noticed. I called back up to the restaurant and they said in order for me to get the order that I did order in the first place I would have to bring the order back up to them for them to do anything about it. Very poor customer service. We are frequent customers and I told them that and they still said there was nothing else they could do.
Watered down margaritas and mid unseasoned tacos for which I had to wait almost 35-40 minutes.

I visited this restaurant yesterday with my daughter, and the experience was deeply disappointing from start to finish. We waited 40 minutes for two simple quesadillas while sitting on the patio. During that time, I requested water three separate times and never received it. Leaving guests outside without water is not only irresponsible but unsafe in 80+ degrees.

When I finally asked for the check, I was overheated and still had no water,  the waitress wanted to argued with me, insisting that “it had only been 40 minutes,” rather than acknowledging the issue or offering any assistance with getting my water(still no water given). She then glared at me during checkout and refused to speak to me, despite the fact that I paid my full bill and did not request any refund.

To make matters worse, when we received the quesadilla to go, it was stone cold.

This level of disregard for customer care and basic hospitality is unacceptable. I will not be returning, and I hope management takes immediate steps to address these issues so no other guests have a similar experience.

Be8ng from Houston, Tx and knowing what authentic Mexican food taste and smells like..there is nothing authentic about this place..people of Michigan are being bamboozled with what they think authentic is. The host had horrible customer service and not welcoming (long wavy brown hair lady)..I asked for no tomatoes on my dish it was LOADED with tomatoes..smh...and they didn't apologize or even offer to make it over..AND THE CHIPS AND SALSA are store bought and not house made..would never go back...

Terrible experience the male server who served me for my order a middle aged old guy with specs was an absolute disgrace. I came to this place for the first time and they put me on a table where the table was shaking and I had to put my leg on the table foot to stop it from shaking and that was not pleasant … the girls at the front of the door who receive guests like when they saw me they are like why are you here kind of expression… now coming back to the waiter / server who takes the order they guy with specs he took my order as I new to eating Mexican food it is his responsibility to tell me what is good and since I wanted to eat polo loco chicken and before that I wanted to have an appetizer I ordered thinking it is a small portion he took the order  and I flipped the page to eat polo loco chicken before ordering I asked him if it would be too much he did not understand I asked if I can eat the appetizer and polo loco he said it will be too much as the appetizer portion would be big and then I realized it was a wrong choice because it was not the one I ate in Netherlands and I wanted to eat polo loco when I said I would like to order polo loco and not the appetizer  he said he already sent the order well helooooo … what js going on here and he said I can eat polo loco some other day. I said yes I will eat but at a better place and not at this place again… then comes the appetizer I did not like it a bit and I felt it was something that was forced on to me to eat it … just ate little and rest was terrible for my pallet this could have been avoided if the guy taking the order was more kind friendly TERRIBLE EXPERIENCE…..

Nery was amazing!! The food and drinks was so delicious, would come back!
Our server Nery was very generous. We definitely will be coming back!
Atmosphere was very lively. Our server Nery was attentive and outright amazing. Will be coming back again!!

My mom and I have been coming to eat here for the past 7 years and the food NEVER disappoints. During our most recent visit, we received incredible service by our waitress Autumn who checked in on us multiple times throughout our dinner and was very kind and friendly.

My mom and I have been coming to eat here for the past 7 years and the food NEVER disappoints. During our most recent visit, we received incredible service by our waitress Autumn who checked in on us multiple times throughout our dinner and was very kind and friendly.
Autumn was our server and she was so wonderful. So sweet and attentive. It was so busy too. Literally perfect service.
Thanks to our waiter Daniel
Thanks to our waiter Daniel

Everything was wonderful!  Our waiter, Nery, was so kind, polite,  and professional.   One of the best.  We ordered the lunch portion of chili rellenos with a taco, which was so much food, it came with two plates. I’m taking some home.  The nacho fajita appetizer was fantastic!  We will be back soon.
Everything was awesome as usual
My waiter Ruben was awesome!!! He was so patient and helpful!!
My waiter Ruben was awesome!!! He was so patient and helpful!!

This is our favorite place to come with our family and friends.  Our server Nery was excellent and went above and beyond to make our girls birthday fun.  I recommend to everyone and also bring works friends here too.  Thank you, Very for amkingnour night.
This is our favorite place! Food, atmosphere and service are always outstanding!!

Great environment, the chips and salsa are delicious. Got a large horchata and did not regret it. Try the quesobirria tacos!! So good. I’ll definitely be coming back, especially in the summer when they open the patio. Our waiter Aily was super sweet, gave us suggestions on the best dishes. Would recommend!

My wife and I love Lost Tres Amigos. It's our local go-to spot. They have Guava flavored margaritas and the food is always tasty no matter what you get but we love the quesabirrias especially. Tonight Aily was our server and she was excellent. Super attentive, professional, and made great recommendations with the spicy tomatillo sauce. We can't wait for summer so we can sit on the renovated patio and watch the cars drive by through downtown Farmington. Such a great spot.
Tacos and combo were great
Watered down margaritas and mid unseasoned tacos for which I had to wait almost 35-40 minutes.

I had a pregnancy craving for birria tacos, so we decided to order some takeout tonight (5/30). By the time we got home after picking up the food, I realized that the consommé wasn’t in the to go order. I guess I should’ve double checked the contents of the bag before leaving, but I didn’t want to tear into it yet.

I was really disappointed because the whole point was to have the rich hearty broth to dip the tacos in. (side note- I also asked for utensils but none were provided :/). That oversight bummed me out as I was hungry and didn’t want to go all the way back just to pick up that one thing.
Food was incredible and very reasonable prices. Nery did an excellent job with service! We will be back

My wife and I had a great experience here the food was high quality well made and well worth the price our server nery did a fantastic job was very attentive to our requests the drinks were fresh the food was light definitely will be coming back.

Five years since I have eaten at Los Tres Amigos. Greeted and seated immediately upon entering. Restaurant clean, renovations beautiful. Server gracious and attentive. Ordered chicken fajitas with vegetables, rice, refried beans, guacamole and flour tortillas. Generous lunch portions at fair price. Meal served hot, fresh and appetizing. Absolutely delicious. Thank you…

A happy surprise for our Tex-Mex tuned tongues, one of 3 places(so far) in Michigan we might return to! Good quality in their food, their salsa is a little 'lite' but very satisfied overall! And they seated 6 of us immediately, two of us under age 6, with great subsequent service!! Only criticism might be it's quite noisy inside.👍👏😋
